name: Amgen Inc.
lede: Amgen runs three centers across three Indian cities. Mumbai, Hyderabad and Bengaluru, covering R&D and IT, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amgen office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amgen Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amgen runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Mumbai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru), covering R&D and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: HEAD – WORKPLACE STRATEGY, FACILITIES & SITE OPERATIONS |
Associate Director - Total Rewards, HR Operations and Payroll

about.description: Amgen's India footprint covers Mumbai, Hyderabad and Bengaluru, spanning R&D and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 29 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Amgen operate in India?
faq.a: Amgen operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amgen have centers in?
faq.a: Amgen's India footprint includes Mumbai and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Amgen run in India?
faq.a: Amgen runs R&D and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amgen's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Amgen's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amgen's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Amgen's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
